title: palaquium cuneatum
intro: Palaquium cuneatum, also known as the Malaysian styrax, is a plant species in the family Sapotaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Palaquium cuneatum include its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, which contributes to its various health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Palaquium cuneatum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
